mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_favorite (user_id, post_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT pf.*, CASE WHEN p.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS post_exists, COALESCE(p.title, CONCAT('【已删除】帖子ID:', pf.post_id)) AS post_title, p.create_time AS post_create_time FROM post_favorite pf LEFT JOIN post p ON pf.post_id = p.id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pf.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId}
